name: Irusu Cricket VR
summary: Step into the pitch with Irusu Cricket VR, built for Meta Quest 3 & 3S. Experience true 1:1 motion batting, realistic physics, and adaptive AI bowlers. Play multiple match formats, use DRS with Hawk-Eye & Snicko, and compete in iconic stadiums. Train in nets, track stats, and feel every shot with immersive haptics and stadium atmosphere.
